license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.in7cdhn
title: Running the PTC-0200 DNA Engine
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Press ENTER to create a new program
Name the program by using the right SELECT key or the left SELECT key to scroll through the characters, and press PROCEED when the desired character is displayed.
Press PROCEED when the name is complete
Enter each step of the program: (TEMP, GRADIENT, GOTO, RAMP, END)
Select the folder that you want to save to, and press PROCEED to save.
Select a folder that contains a protocol that you want to run
Select YES or NO for heated lid
The program will begin to run Press CANCEL and YES to cancel the program
